{{Infobox concept
| name = Oracle of Solstice
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lutoch Terelle]] is an individual known unofficially as the Oracle of [[Solstice]]. A licensed [[Archmage]] specializing in predictive divination, she possesses the ability to compare information against the [[Aether]]. She serves as an employee of [[Solstice]], a shadow organization that exerts control over the [[Galactic Union]] and is composed of [[World Spirits]]. While [[Solstice]] is often perceived as a brilliant and distant entity, Terelle works to unravel mysteries, though she remains unable to uncover all of her employer's secrets. She has been observed monitoring battles from within a sensory deprivation tank, and there is uncertainty regarding whether she is the true Oracle or merely a proxy for the organization.}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Oracle of Solstice]] is the unofficial title held by [[Lutoch Terelle]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Oracle]] of [[Solstice]] is a mysterious entity believed to possess the power of mind reading and foresight, communicating with others through various messages. While some believe this figure is located on [[Zykaros]], others maintain the Oracle resides on [[Omega]]'s home planet. The crew has actively pursued leads regarding this group, which is identified as [[Lutoch Terelle]]. During their investigations, a target being dragged becomes a primary suspect for the identity of the Oracle.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Oracle]] of the [[Solstice]] is [[Lutoch Terelle]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Oracle of Solstice]] is a group that contacts people via messages and is believed to be able to read minds and see the future.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Oracle of Solstice]] is believed to be on [[Omega]]'s home planet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Oracle of Solstice]] is a figure believed to be located on [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Oracle of Solstice]] is an entity that the crew has leads on.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The target being dragged is suspected to be the [[Oracle of Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
